---
title: "A test Markdown"
author: "Amy_Neal"
date: "2026-04-09"
output: 
  html_document: 
    keep_md: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Testing R markdown in gitHub 

```{r}
#packages
library(psych)
library(fpp2)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
ap <- AirPassengers
```

```{r}
autoplot(ap) +
  theme_classic()
```
